{{Infobox group
| name = Sleepless
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Sleepless Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Sleepless is a complex organization characterized by some as a modern-day cult and by others as a group striving for human progress. Led by a secretive cabal that communicates with the [[Great Elders]] via [[void]] transmissions and messengers known as [[Elderspawn]], the group's primary objective is to establish communication with these powerful entities. They seek to gain wisdom from the [[Elders]] for the benefit of all humanity, though they distinguish themselves from groups like the [[Blackwatch]] by not capturing or examining the [[Elders]] themselves. Within their ranks, they hold certain [[Great Elders]] in higher regard than others; for instance, [[Kelarac]] is viewed as a vital link for interaction between species. The organization is composed of various factions, including the [[Eyes of Crossing]], the [[Sisters of the Fading Moon]], and the [[Lamplighters]], all of which have unified under the Sleepless banner. Their membership includes diverse individuals, ranging from acolytes and leaders to highly valued [[Soulbound]] combatants. While some members view their mission as a pursuit of purpose and risk, others see it as a means to deepen divisions between the various [[Guilds]]. Despite their stated goals of enlightenment, they are often perceived as a source of disruption and instability by the established [[Guilds]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Sleepless is a cabal that raised [[Jerri]] and provided her with specific instructions. After being inducted into the group by her father, [[Jerri]] became a member of this organization which promises its followers a [[life]] defined by purpose and risk. Guided by the credo 'That which sleeps will soon wake,' the members stay awake to serve their own interests while the [[Great Elders]] sleep. Although they do not worship the [[Elders]] and are not a cult, at least one member of the Sleepless remains under the care of the [[Consultants]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Sleepless]] is a group that [[Jerri]] belongs to.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Sleepless]] is a group that has at least one member in the care of the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Jerri's father]] inducted her into the [[Sleepless]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Sleepless]] is a group with the credo 'That which sleeps will soon wake.'<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Sleepless]] stay awake and serve their interests while the [[Great Elders]] sleep.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Sleepless]] promise a [[life]] full of risk and purpose.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Sleepless]] do not worship [[Elders]] and are not a cult.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Sleepless]] are a group that [[Jerri]] was raised by.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Sleepless]] is a cabal that gave [[Jerri]] instructions.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Sleepless]] is a cabal.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c27">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The Sleepless is a group composed of both men and women. While they are characterized as a cult led by a cabal, [[Jyrine]] maintains that the organization is not a cult and does not engage in the worship of [[Elders]]. During their period of planning, they dispatched a messenger, potentially an [[Elderspawn]], into the cell of [[Lucan]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Sleepless]] are a cult with a cabal of leaders.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Sleepless]] sent a messenger into [[Lucan's cell]], likely an [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Sleepless]] are planning something.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Sleepless]] are a group that [[Jyrine]] claims is not a cult and does not worship [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Sleepless]] is a group of men and women.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c27">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The Sleepless is a cultist cabal whose activities within the [[Aion Sea]] are closely monitored by the [[Navigator’s Guild]]. Composed of acolytes who wear [[Open Eye medallions]], this group is often represented by the symbol of the Open [[Eye]] and actively seeks to make new recruits. Despite their numbers, the cabal possesses only one true combat-capable [[Soulbound]] among its membership. The group is known to engage in lengthy deliberations and maintains frequent contact with [[Calder]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Navigator’s Guild]] monitors [[Sleepless]] activity in the [[Aion Sea]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c1">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Jerri]] waited for the [[Sleepless]] cabal to stop deliberating.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c3">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Sleepless]] is a cabal that has only one true combat-capable [[Soulbound]] in their membership.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The symbol of the Open [[Eye]] often stands for the [[Sleepless]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Sleepless]] make recruits.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Sleepless]] are acolytes who wear [[Open Eye medallions]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Sleepless]] are cultists.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Sleepless]] are a group that [[Calder]] is in frequent contact with.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Sleepless]] have de facto control of the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Sleepless]] are an entity that humanity must face.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Sleepless]] opposed the attempt to gain access to the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Guided by predictions from [[Ach'magut]], the Sleepless operate under a structured leadership. While their cell in the [[Capital]] faces the constant threat of discovery by [[Watchmen]] or [[Magisters]], the group is widely perceived as evil by the rest of the world. Their efforts include securing bargains with the [[Great Elders]], though they do not treat all such entities equally and maintain detailed records of their conversations. The organization's influence is further evidenced by the successful breakout of [[Jerri]] from the [[Gray Island]] cell and the fact that [[Calder]]'s wife was once a member.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Sleepless]] have predictions from [[Ach'magut]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Sleepless]] cell in the [[Capital]] risks being picked up by a [[Magister]] or [[Watchman]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Sleepless]] have leaders.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Sleepless]] are viewed by the rest of the world as evil.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Sleepless]] do not deal with all [[Great Elders]] equally.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Jerri]] broke out of the [[Gray Island]] cell with help from the [[Sleepless]] cabal.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Sleepless]] want to secure a bargain with the [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Sleepless]] left records including transcripts of conversations with [[Great Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]]'s wife was one of the [[Sleepless]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Sleepless]] had been corralled and surrounded by fog.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c1">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Sleepless]] is a banner under which various cults have banded together.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Sleepless]] have been instructed to deepen the divide between [[Guilds]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“It means there is at least one member of the Sleepless in the care of the Consultants right now.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“That which sleeps will soon wake.” ... It’s the credo of a group that call themselves the Sleepless.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“The Sleepless do not worship Elders. We’re not a cult.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|"Are you still in frequent contact with the Sleepless, Captain Marten?"<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“The Sleepless do not worship Elders. We’re not a cult.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
